TextView.android:text:
Weekly Goals

1.Set Exercise Targets
Decide how many times you will exercise each week and try to stick to it.

2.Plan Meals
Plan balanced meals for the week including proteins, fruits, and vegetables.

3.Hydration Goals
Set a goal for daily water intake and track it throughout the week.

4.Meditation Minutes
Decide how many minutes to meditate each day and aim to complete it.

5.Sleep Schedule
Plan to sleep at regular times each night for proper rest.

6.Motivation Check
Write a small motivational note or reminder to keep yourself encouraged.

7.Track Progress
Review daily achievements and note improvements or areas to work on.

8.Review and Adjust
At the end of the week, reflect on what worked and adjust goals for next week.
